CVE-2025-50952.title: openjpeg v 2.5.0 was discovered to contain a NULL pointer derefer ...
CVE-2025-50952.description: openjpeg v 2.5.0 was discovered to contain a NULL pointer dereference via the component /openjp2/dwt.c.

CVE-2025-54874.title: OpenJPEG is an open-source JPEG 2000 codec. In OpenJPEG from 2.5. ...
CVE-2025-54874.description: OpenJPEG is an open-source JPEG 2000 codec. In OpenJPEG from 2.5.1 through 2.5.3, a call to opj_jp2_read_header may lead to OOB heap memory write when the data stream p_stream is too short and p_image is not initialized.
